zh.Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o奧利格斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues於1260年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o奧利格斯時，她的父親Agnon VII d’Olliergues30歲，母親Adélaïs de Courcelles-du-Breuil16歲。她於1275年1月10日與Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1301年之後，埋葬在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德。

zh-hans.Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-: 法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o奧利格斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues于1260年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o奧利格斯时，她的父亲Agnon VII d’Olliergues30岁，母亲Adélaïs de Courcelles-du-Breuil16岁。她于1275年1月10日与Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1301年之后，埋葬在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meymont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Wyman
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Wymund, Wymond (Old English Wīgmund, composed of the elements wīg ‘war’ + mund ‘protection’). In Lincolnshire, Leicestershire, and Norfolk the personal name may be the Old Norse cognate Vigmundr, Vimund.
Americanized form of North German   Weimann  . Compare   Wiman  .
History: John Wyman, from Hertfordshire, England, was one of the founders of Woburn, MA, in 1640.

nameMeanings.name: Béatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues was born in 1260, in Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Agnon VII d’Olliergues, was 30 and her mother, Adélaïs de Courcelles-du-Breuil, was 16. She married Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne on 10 January 1275, in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died after 1301, and was buried in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues est née en 1260, à Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Agnon VII d’Olliergues, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Adélaïs de Courcelles-du-Breuil, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne le 10 janvier 1275, à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1301, et a été enterrée à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues 1260 in Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Agnon VII d’Olliergues 30 und ihre Mutter Adélaïs de Courcelles-du-Breuil 16. Sie hat am 10. Januar 1275 in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1301 und wurde in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues è nata il nel 1260 nel Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Agnon VII d’Olliergues, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Adélaïs de Courcelles-du-Breuil, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne il 10 gennaio 1275, nel Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1301, e fu sepolta a Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.La Tour-d'Auvergne, Issoire, Puy-de-Dôme: フランスアウバーグンプウイ-デ-ドoメラ トウル-ド'アウバーグン
ja.Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランド
ja.Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメオリールグス
ja.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Meymont d’Olierguesが1260年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメオリールグスで生まれた時，父Agnon VII d’Ollierguesは30歳，母Adélaïs de Courcelles-du-Breuilは16歳であった。1275年1月10日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドでBernard II la Tour d'Auvergneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1301年以後に死去し，フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues(이)가 1260년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 리르구스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Agnon VII d’Olliergues(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adélaïs de Courcelles-du-Breuil(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1275년 1월 10일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에서 Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1301년 이후 사망했으며 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues nasceu em 1260, em Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Agnon VII d’Olliergues, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Adélaïs de Courcelles-du-Breuil, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne em 10 de janeiro de 1275, em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1301, e foi sepultada em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues родилась в 1260 г. в местности оллииргуесь, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Agnon VII d’Olliergues было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Adélaïs de Courcelles-du-Breuil, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne 10 января 1275 г. в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1301 г. и была похоронена в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Béatrix de Meymont d’Oliergues nació en 1260, en Olliergues, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Agnon VII d’Olliergues, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Adélaïs de Courcelles-du-Breuil, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Bernard II la Tour d'Auvergne el 10 de enero de 1275, en Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1301, y fue sepultada en Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
